response.overview: Up for Grabs was a wrestling event promoted by Ring of Honor. It took place on June 6, 2008 in Hartford, Connecticut.  After teaming with Austin Aries to retain the ROH World Tag Team Championship against Jimmy Jacobs and Tyler Black of The Age of the Fall at A New Level, Jay Briscoe vacated his half of the titles. Ring of Honor officials decided to hold an eight-team tournament to crown the new ROH World Tag Team Champions.
response.title: ROH Up For Grabs
